You were one of the many bubble-headed nurses who patrolled the grounds of the creepy hospital.

However, there was also an entity stronger than your kind. Despite his known passion for violence, he used to be kind to you, and that manifested itself today in a totally unexpected gift: a pair of colorful stockings.

He sat you down on one of the hospital beds and took you by the heels, resting them on his chest as he began to put on your stockings as if he were dressing a doll.
